$comment: Gzip byte ceilings for scripts/check-size.mjs (esbuild bundle, production condition, min+gzip). Measured 2026-06-09: core-counter 5651 B, scaffold-counter 5754 B (audit's real vite-scaffold counter measured 7.10 KB). Ceilings = measured reality + headroom; raise only deliberately, in the same PR as the growth.

core-counter.description: what-core runtime imported by a typical h()-based counter app (production condition)

scaffold-counter.description: create-what vanilla template counter (src/main.jsx equivalent) via what-framework + runtime JSX (production condition); ceiling 7.8 KB covers the audit-measured 7.10 KB real-scaffold build + ~10%
